bargeIn.note: build implements streaming TTS — cancel_tts hard-stops an in-flight forward pass at the next kernel boundary

gen.content:
ably, the first and last terms of the sequence are the same as the first and last terms of the original sequence.

So, the problem is now to find the number of distinct terms in the original

perPhrase.phrase: the first and last terms of the sequence
are the same as the first and last
